basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Admin Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode has released the official notification for 1 Admin. Associate posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Kerala. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduation with minimum two years experience in Clerical duties/office administration, Graduation with minimum three years experience in Clerical duties/office administration, Proficiency in MS-Office, internet, Zoom/online meeting tools, English and Hindi communication, Drafting skills
qualification.details: Post-Graduation with a minimum of two years of experience in Clerical duties/office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt./Private Organization. OR Graduation with a minimum of three years of experience in Clerical duties/office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt./Private Organization. Proficiency in MS-Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.), internet usage, Zoom, or any online meeting tools. Good communication proficiency in English (both written and verbal) and Hindi. Drafting skills.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Kozhikode Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Vacancy Details 2026
IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Post-Graduation with a minimum of two years of experience in Clerical duties/office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt./Private Organization. OR Graduation with a minimum of three years of experience in Clerical duties/office administration in a reputed Educational Institute or any Govt./Private Organization. Proficiency in MS-Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.), internet usage, Zoom, or any online meeting tools. Good communication proficiency in English (both written and verbal) and Hindi. Drafting skills.

IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate position is 27th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Admin. Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post-Graduation with at least two years of experience or a Graduation with at least three years of experience in clerical duties or office administration. Proficiency in MS-Office and communication skills are also essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Admin. Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Admin. Associate post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the government norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Admin. Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Admin. Associate position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 24,300/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Admin. Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Admin. Associate post in the Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the IIM Kozhikode recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Admin. Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Admin. Associate role involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview, which will be conducted via video conference.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Admin. Associate position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode is located in Kozhikode, Kerala, with the pincode 673570.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Kerala apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Kerala. However, it is advisable to check the detailed official notification for any specific residency requirements.
